summary: Hemali Payment workflow testing complete - all NEW features working: Mark Paid, Undo, Print, Delete. Full cycle verified: Create (unpaid) → Mark Paid (creates cash entry) → Undo (removes cash entry) → Mark Paid again. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All action buttons working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mark Paid endpoint correctly changes status and creates cash book nikasi entry
Undo endpoint correctly reverts status and removes cash book entries using reference matching
Print Receipt returns valid PDF with payment details
Summary cards correctly count only 'paid' payments
Frontend buttons correctly toggle based on payment status (CheckCircle for unpaid, Undo2 for paid)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed items and payments for testing, cleanup performed via autouse fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hemali payment workflow fully functional. Ramesh payment currently has status=paid with cash book entry. Key workflow: Create → unpaid (no cash entry) → Mark Paid (cash nikasi entry) → Undo (removes cash entry) → Mark Paid again (new cash entry).

create_payment_unpaid.details: New payments created with status='unpaid', NO cash book entries created

mark_paid_endpoint.details: PUT /api/hemali/payments/{id}/mark-paid changes status to 'paid' and creates cash book nikasi entry

undo_payment_endpoint.details: PUT /api/hemali/payments/{id}/undo changes status to 'unpaid' and removes cash book entries

print_receipt_endpoint.details: GET /api/hemali/payments/{id}/print returns PDF with content-type application/pdf

delete_payment.details: Removes payment and any associated cash book entries

advance_only_counts_paid.details: GET /api/hemali/advance only considers payments with status='paid'

full_workflow_cycle.details: Create → Mark Paid → Undo → Mark Paid Again - all transitions work correctly

frontend_mark_paid_button.details: Green CheckCircle button shown for unpaid payments, clicking changes to Undo button

frontend_undo_button.details: Orange Undo2 button shown for paid payments, clicking changes to Mark Paid button

frontend_print_button.details: Blue Printer button always visible for all payments

frontend_delete_button.details: Red Trash2 button always visible for all payments

frontend_summary_cards.details: Summary cards (Total Payments, Total Work, Total Paid) only count status='paid' payments

cash_book_integration.details: Cash book nikasi entry created with reference 'hemali_payment:{id}' on mark-paid, removed on undo/delete

verified_cash_book_entry.description: Hemali: Ramesh - Paddy Bag Unload x100.0
